form.formComment: Latest effort finished 7th over 525m at this track beaten 6 lengths (30.72) behind Aston Policy in a Grade 5 on April 4. Tipped to improve sharply. Rates highly on best form.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Latest effort finished 7th over 525m at this track beaten 6 lengths (30.72) behind Aston Policy in a Grade 5 on April 4. Tipped to improve sharply. Rates highly on best form.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Slow to begin; Faltered and lost ground approaching winning post.

form.formComment: Got back last start and could only manage sixth but before that won by half a length at Bendigo (23.98) beating Demon Kysaiah in a Special conditions H on March 31. Has ability and looks a winning hope.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Got back last start and could only manage sixth but before that won by half a length at Bendigo (23.98) beating Demon Kysaiah in a Special conditions H on March 31. Has ability and looks a winning hope.

form.formComment: Won two starts back after racing on the pace at Geelong over 460m in 26.08. Couldn't repeat the feat last time out when fifth over 410m at Horsham at Grade 5 level. Look for improvement. Not out of it.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Won two starts back after racing on the pace at Geelong over 460m in 26.08. Couldn't repeat the feat last time out when fifth over 410m at Horsham at Grade 5 level. Look for improvement. Not out of it.

form.formComment: Did a good job two starts back at Ballarat to win by 5.5 lengths in 25.55, beating Elevate. Last start finished 6th on April 3 over 460m at Geelong behind Little Flower beaten 11 lengths (26.62) in a Grade 5. Prepared to overlook.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Did a good job two starts back at Ballarat to win by 5.5 lengths in 25.55, beating Elevate. Last start finished 6th on April 3 over 460m at Geelong behind Little Flower beaten 11 lengths (26.62) in a Grade 5. Prepared to overlook.

form.formComment: Won two starts back when well in the market at Horsham over 485m. Last start finished 2nd over 410m at Horsham beaten half a length (23.53) behind Super Symon in a Grade 5 on April 7. Yet to win but has been in the money two times from four starts off this box. Right in the mix.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Won two starts back when well in the market at Horsham over 485m. Last start finished 2nd over 410m at Horsham beaten half a length (23.53) behind Super Symon in a Grade 5 on April 7. Yet to win but has been in the money two times from four starts off this box. Right in the mix.

form.formComment: Has finished in the placings at last two, the latest when second (25.93) over 450m at Shepparton. Prefer others.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Has finished in the placings at last two, the latest when second (25.93) over 450m at Shepparton. Prefer others.

form.formComment: Last start winner at Mt Gambier over 512m running a time of 29.57. Should be prominent.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Last start winner at Mt Gambier over 512m running a time of 29.57. Should be prominent.

form.formComment: Hit the ground running with a fast early sectional but found one better when runner up over 450m at Shepparton clocking 25.47. Close to the speed and boxed on well at his latest run. In the mix again.
